title: minuartia verna subsp. idaea
intro: Minuartia verna subsp. idaea, also known as the Alpine Spring-cress, is a plant species that belongs to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae) and is native to high-altitude mountainous regions. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Minuartia verna subsp. idaea include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system, as well as its potential antiviral and antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and its herbal preparations are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
